stemHtml: An able bodied passenger is travelling with a support dog in the cabin (the dog is small and carried in a box next to the feet of the passenger). Can the passenger and support dog be seated by the over wing emergency exit?

options.a: Both must be reseated not by the emergency exit.
options.b: They should be seated next to a ground-level emergency exit for easier evacuation of the dog.
options.c: They can stay by the emergency exit as it is preferred for a quick evacuation of the dog as it may get stressed during an emergency.
options.d: The dog is not allowed in the passenger cabin and must be transported in a cage in the cargo compartment.
